aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to the lack of structured data and conversational content, but there is potential for improvement.
quick_wins: Add an FAQ section with structured data.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings and complete information, but posts and Q&A sections could be more active.
critical_issues: Lack of engagement in the Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data prevents AI from identifying the business as a relevant result.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local HVAC service queries where AI assistants prioritize structured data and authority signals.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQ schema markup.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Showcasing certifications, partnerships, and detailed service expertise to establish authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for Answer Engine Optimization (AEO).
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AEO, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI assistants.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks essential schema markup and conversational content, making it less visible to AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy includes implementing structured data, creating FAQ content, and enhancing authority signals to make your business stand out to AI models.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors who adopt AEO now will capture market share, leaving you behind.
